components.title: Key Concepts: Machine Learning Pipelines
components.summary: An overview of the core ML pipeline stages covered in this training.

cards.title: Data Preprocessing
cards.subtitle: Key takeaway 1
cards.content: Machine learning pipelines **automate** the workflow from raw data to deployed model. The preprocessing stage handles cleaning, normalization, and feature extraction.

cards.title: Feature Engineering
cards.subtitle: Key takeaway 2
cards.content: Feature selection and transformation determine model quality more than algorithm choice. Domain expertise is critical for identifying meaningful features.

cards.title: Model Training
cards.subtitle: Key takeaway 3
cards.content: Training involves iterating on hyperparameters, cross-validation, and careful monitoring for overfitting. Use early stopping to prevent wasted compute.

cards.title: Deployment & Monitoring
cards.subtitle: Key takeaway 4
cards.content: A deployed model requires continuous monitoring for data drift, performance degradation, and concept drift. Automated retraining pipelines are essential for production ML.
